mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS BILL_CNT,
SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_CNT,
SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD IN ('READY', 'UNPAID') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UNPAID_CNT,
SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OVERDUE_CNT,
NVL(SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS TOTAL_BILL_AMT,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN NVL(B.PYMT_AMT, B.BILL_TOT_AMT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_PAID_AMT,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD != 'PAID' THEN B.BILL_TOT_AMT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_UNPAID_AMT,
CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1 ) END AS PAID_RATE,
NVL(ROUND(AVG(B.BILL_TOT_AMT)), 0) AS AVG_BILL_AMT, NVL(MIN(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS MIN_BILL_AMT, NVL(MAX(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS MAX_BILL_AMT
FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm}

SELECT B.BILL_YM, COUNT(*) AS MONTH_BILL_CNT,
SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MONTH_PAID_CNT,
NVL(SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS MONTH_BILL_AMT,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID' THEN NVL(B.PYMT_AMT, B.BILL_TOT_AMT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS MONTH_PAID_AMT
FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm} GROUP BY B.BILL_YM ORDER BY B.BILL_YM

WITH ITEM_SUM AS ( SELECT BD.BILL_ITEM_CD, NVL(C.CODE_NAME, BD.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS BILL_ITEM_NM, SUM(BD.BILL_ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_TOTAL_AMT FROM BILL_DETAIL BD JOIN BILL B ON BD.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'EXPN_CD' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = BD.BILL_ITEM_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm} GROUP BY BD.BILL_ITEM_CD, NVL(C.CODE_NAME, BD.BILL_ITEM_CD) ), TOTAL_SUM AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(ITEM_TOTAL_AMT), 0) AS TOTAL_AMT FROM ITEM_SUM ) SELECT I.BILL_ITEM_CD, I.BILL_ITEM_NM, I.ITEM_TOTAL_AMT, CASE WHEN T.TOTAL_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(I.ITEM_TOTAL_AMT / T.TOTAL_AMT * 100, 1) END AS ITEM_RATE FROM ITEM_SUM I CROSS JOIN TOTAL_SUM T ORDER BY I.ITEM_TOTAL_AMT DESC

SELECT B.PYMT_STTS_CD, NVL(C.CODE_NAME, B.PYMT_STTS_CD) AS PYMT_STTS_NM, COUNT(*) AS STATUS_CNT, NVL(SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT), 0) AS STATUS_AMT FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_ST' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = B.PYMT_STTS_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm} GROUP BY B.PYMT_STTS_CD, NVL(C.CODE_NAME, B.PYMT_STTS_CD) ORDER BY STATUS_AMT DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT H.HO_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO, SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT) AS HOUSE_TOTAL_AMT FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm} GROUP BY H.HO_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO ORDER BY SUM(B.BILL_TOT_AMT) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
